sections.executive_summary:
This proposal outlines how we'll build and operate a complete AI-powered content engine for [Company Name]. Over the next 90 days, we'll establish your brand voice in AI systems, build a documented content production workflow, and deliver consistent, high-quality content across your blog, LinkedIn, and email channels — without adding headcount or spending 20+ hours per week creating it internally.

Monthly investment: $3,500/month. 3-month minimum engagement.
sections.problem_statement:
[Company Name] is in a strong position to grow through content, but the current approach isn't sustainable. Content is published sporadically — sometimes weekly, sometimes not for a month. The team has ideas but no system. When a post does go out, it performs well but there's no consistent follow-through to build authority over time.

This inconsistency has a real cost. Your competitors are publishing 3–4x per month. B2B buyers make purchase decisions after consuming multiple pieces of content from a brand. Without a consistent presence, you're not in the consideration set when they're ready to buy.

The deeper problem: the current approach relies entirely on one or two people finding time. That means every editorial calendar depends on their bandwidth, and content dies when other priorities take over.
sections.proposed_solution:
We'll implement a three-part system:

**Part 1: Brand Voice & AI Training (Weeks 1–2)**
We begin by documenting [Company Name]'s voice, tone, and perspective in a format that AI tools can use consistently. This means interviewing your subject matter experts, reviewing your best existing content, and creating a detailed brand voice guide and prompt library. This is the foundation that makes all AI-generated content sound like you, not like everyone else.

**Part 2: Editorial System (Week 2)**
We build a content calendar in [Notion / Airtable] that plans topics 4–6 weeks ahead, maps each piece to a business goal (awareness, consideration, or conversion), and tracks production status from idea to published. You'll have full visibility and the ability to add topics, change priorities, and flag anything for review.

**Part 3: Production Engine (Week 3 onward)**
Once the system is running, our monthly production cadence begins:
- 6 blog posts per month (1,000–1,500 words each, fully written, formatted, and ready to publish)
- 20 LinkedIn posts (mix of insight posts, question posts, and content promotion)
- 4 email newsletters (curated from the month's content, with original commentary)
- Monthly performance analysis (what's working, what to do more of)
sections.deliverables_and_timeline:
**Month 1:**
- Brand voice document and AI prompt library
- Content calendar setup
- 6 blog posts
- 20 LinkedIn posts
- 4 email newsletters
- Month 1 performance review

**Month 2–3 (Ongoing):**
- Same monthly deliverables
- SEO performance tracking added in month 2
- Content repurposing workflow (each blog → multiple social formats) introduced in month 3
- Monthly 30-minute review call to align on direction

**Handover (Month 4+):**
If desired, we can transition the system to your internal team at month 4 with full documentation. Alternatively, we continue as your content partner on an ongoing basis.
sections.investment:
**Monthly Retainer: $3,500/month**

Includes:
- Brand voice document and prompt library (one-time setup, no additional charge)
- 6 blog posts per month
- 20 LinkedIn posts per month
- 4 email newsletters per month
- Monthly performance report
- Monthly 30-minute review call
- Ongoing editorial calendar management

Billing: Monthly, in advance. 3-month minimum commitment.

**For context:** A traditional content agency producing similar volume would charge $8,000–$15,000/month. A single content strategist hire would cost $60,000–$90,000/year in salary plus benefits, with no guarantee of output volume. This service delivers consistent output at a fraction of either cost.
sections.team:
**[Your Name], AI Content Strategist & Lead**
Responsible for brand voice training, editorial calendar strategy, content quality review, and client communication. [2-3 sentences about relevant experience — e.g., 'I've built AI content systems for B2B SaaS companies including [X] and [Y], consistently generating 30–40% organic traffic growth within 6 months.']

**AI Production System**
Content is produced using a trained combination of Claude/GPT-4 (drafting), Surfer SEO (optimization), and our proprietary prompt library. All content is reviewed by a human editor before delivery.
sections.next_steps:
To move forward:

1. Review this proposal and confirm the scope works for you
2. Sign the service agreement (we'll send it via DocuSign)
3. Pay month 1 invoice ($3,500) to secure your start date
4. Complete our brand intake form (30 minutes, sent upon signing)
5. Brand voice + AI training session scheduled for week 1

**Proposed start date: [DATE]**

I'm holding this date for [Company Name] for 5 business days. If you have questions or want to discuss the scope, reply to this email or call me at [phone]. I'm happy to walk through the proposal on a 20-minute call.

sections.executive_summary:
This proposal covers an AI-powered content and email production system for [Brand Name] — specifically designed for e-commerce, where content needs to drive traffic AND convert to purchases. We'll build product description systems, SEO content, and email flows that run consistently without requiring your time.

Monthly investment: $2,500/month.
sections.problem_statement:
[Brand Name] has strong products and good customer reviews, but the digital content operation isn't keeping pace. Product descriptions are thin and not optimized for search. The email list is underutilized — you're sending occasional promotions but not building a consistent relationship with customers. Blog content, when it happens, isn't tied to a keyword strategy.

The result: organic traffic is flat despite strong brand momentum. Email revenue is lower than industry benchmarks for a list your size.
sections.proposed_solution:
We'll implement an e-commerce specific content system with three components:

**1. SEO Content Engine:** Monthly blog content targeting transactional and informational keywords in your category. Each post is researched, written with SEO intent, internally linked, and formatted for Featured Snippets.

**2. Product Description System:** We'll audit your current product descriptions and build AI systems to generate optimized descriptions at scale — with your brand voice, benefit-forward language, and SEO terms built in. For new products, we'll deliver descriptions within 48 hours of receiving product specs.

**3. Email Sequence + Newsletter Production:** A welcome sequence for new subscribers (5 emails, written and loaded), plus a monthly email newsletter with product spotlights, content roundup, and brand storytelling.
sections.deliverables_and_timeline:
Month 1: Brand voice + SEO audit + welcome sequence build (5 emails) + 2 blog posts + 20 product description rewrites
Month 2+: 4 blog posts/month + 2 email newsletters + up to 10 new product descriptions + monthly analytics report
sections.investment:
**Monthly Retainer: $2,500/month**

Includes all deliverables above. 3-month minimum. SEO setup and email sequence build included at no additional charge in month 1 (valued at $1,500).
sections.team: [Your Name] as lead strategist. AI production tools trained on your brand voice. Human QA on all content before delivery.
sections.next_steps: Reply to this email with questions or to confirm start date. Service agreement and invoice sent upon verbal confirmation. Onboarding form takes approximately 20 minutes and gives us everything we need to begin.
